title: Matterbridge NoLongerEvil Thermostat plugin
description: Bridges No Longer Evil (Nest) thermostats from a self-hosted control server into Matterbridge.

apiUrl.title: Control server URL
apiUrl.description: Base URL of the No Longer Evil self-hosted control server, e.g. http://192.168.1.10:8082

pollIntervalSeconds.title: Poll interval (seconds)
pollIntervalSeconds.description: Defensive periodic re-sync interval. The plugin uses the SSE stream for live updates and only falls back to polling at this cadence to recover from missed events. Set to 0 to disable.

whiteList.title: White List
whiteList.description: Only thermostats whose name or serial appears in this list will be exposed. If empty, all are exposed.

blackList.title: Black List
blackList.description: Thermostats whose name or serial appears in this list will not be exposed.

debug.title: Enable Debug
debug.description: Enable debug mode for the plugin. Only for debugging purposes, not recommended for production use.

unregisterOnShutdown.title: Unregister On Shutdown
unregisterOnShutdown.description: Unregister all devices on shutdown. Only for debugging purposes, not recommended for production use.
